title: Actions & Java
description: Actions & Stuff but in Java Edition
body:
**FINALLY** 1.2 is **OUT**!

Actions & Java is a version of Actions & Stuff but for Minecraft Java Edition that uses several mods to make a more "realistic" experience without removing the "vanilla" feeling

You can customize the Modpack however you want by installing other mods that you want.

All mods used are Client-Sided.

More things coming soon...

![Actions & Java New Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c73b7ea6e276ec59bc0021989a013b2635475714.png)
